sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65327" key="megada/ktulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγα-δάκτῠλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n65327.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">big toe</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg011:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.35</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
